data.title: ChoiceOne Financial Servs (COFS) Q4 earnings beat estimates by 1% with EPS of $0.92. Revenue up $18.59 million year-over-year.
data.description: On Friday, January 30, 2026, ChoiceOne Financial Services (NASDAQ: COFS) released its Q4 earnings report at 07:30 AM. The latest announcement revealed that ChoiceOne Financial Services exceeded estimated earnings by 1.0%, with an EPS of $0.92 compared to the estimated $0.91. The revenue also saw a significant increase of $18.59 million from the corresponding period in the previous year. ChoiceOne Financial Services has a history of surpassing EPS estimates. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Imperial Oil Q4 beats estimate with EPS of $1.41, revenue down by $924M vs. last year. Investors take note.
data.description: Imperial Oil (AMEX: IMO) released their Q4 earnings on Friday, January 30, 2026 at 07:55 AM. In terms of revenue, there was a $924.00 million decrease from the corresponding period the previous year. data.title: Canadian National Railway beat Q4 earnings by 4%, reporting EPS of $1.49 vs estimated $1.43, with revenue up $86M.
data.description: Canadian National Railway (CNI) recently released its Q4 earnings on January 30, 2026, at 07:30 AM. The company surpassed projected earnings by 4.0%, posting an EPS of $1.49 compared to the estimated $1.43. Revenue also increased by $86.00 million from the previous year. This marks a positive performance compared to previous earnings reports. For more detailed information, the complete story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Wolfspeed gets CFIUS approval for equity issuance to Renesas as part of restructuring after Chapter 11 filing.
data.description: In Durham, North Carolina, Wolfspeed, Inc., known for its silicon carbide technology, has received formal approval from the Committee on Foreign Investment in the United States (CFIUS) for its equity issuance to Renesas Electronics America Inc. This approval marks a significant step in Wolfspeed's restructuring agreement in connection with its Chapter 11 proceedings. This move solidifies the Company's strategic partnership as it navigates through its financial reorganization.

data.title: NKK Switches partners with JF Kilfoil as new Midwest Sales Rep. Commitment to quality.
data.description: NKK Switches, a renowned company specializing in electromechanical switches, has recently partnered with JF Kilfoil to serve as their authorized sales representative for the Midwest Region. This partnership aims to enhance their presence in the area and provide top-quality switch solutions. NKK Switches is known for its commitment to excellence, producing reliable and innovative products. JF Kilfoil, recognized for their technical proficiency, will be instrumental in expanding NKK Switches' market reach. This collaboration showcases the companies' dedication to delivering superior switch solutions to customers in the Midwest Region.

data.title: REX Shares and Tuttle Capital Management introduce T-REX 2X Long RDW Daily Target ETF (RDWU), offering 2x daily exposure to Redwire Corporation (NYSE: RDW).
data.description: Miami - REX Shares (REX) and Tuttle Capital Management (TCM) have introduced the T-REX 2X Long RDW Daily Target ETF (CBOE: RDWU). This leveraged ETF aims to offer 2x daily long exposure to Redwire Corporation (NYSE: RDW). RDWU seeks to provide 200% of RDW’s daily performance, enabling traders to participate in a company focused on developing innovative space, aerospace, and defense infrastructure technologies. Redwire Corporation has garnered attention for its recent accomplishments, and RDWU offers investors a strategic tool to capitalize on these developments.

data.title: Zebra Technologies and NFL reveal Super Bowl LX insights using Next Gen Stats, at annual press conference on Feb 4.
data.description: Zebra Technologies Corporation, a leader in digitizing frontline workflows, will host its annual Super Bowl press conference on Feb. 4 from 1-2pm PT. The conference will feature experts from NFL, NFL Network, Zebra, and Adrenaline discussing insights for Super Bowl LX using Next Gen Stats (NGS) data on location, speed, and movement. Zebra's RFID technology will capture this data for analysis. The event aims to provide valuable information ahead of the Super Bowl.

data.title: Kazia Therapeutics reveals new data on nuclear PD-L1 degrader showing potential to address immunotherapy resistance.
data.description: A recent study has revealed that nuclear PD-L1, a previously overlooked factor, plays a significant role in both immunotherapy resistance and the advancement of metastatic cancer. Kazia Therapeutics, a pharmaceutical company dedicated to oncology research and development, listed on the NASDAQ as KZIA, is at the forefront of developing innovative treatments for challenging cancers. This discovery sheds light on the importance of addressing nuclear PD-L1 in devising effective therapies.
ProMIS Neurosciences secures funding of $175 million through private placement financing.

data.description: Earlier today, in Aliso Viejo California, Sunstone Hotel Investors, Inc. This announcement pertains to the record payable dates...

data.title: Nuwellis appoints Carisa Schultz as CFO with expertise in public company healthcare finance and medical tech to aid growth.
data.description: Bringing valuable expertise in public company healthcare finance and medical technology, Schultz joins Nuwellis to bolster the company's growth. With a proven track record in these fields, Schultz's addition is expected to propel Nuwellis to new heights. This strategic move comes at a crucial time as Nuwellis prepares for its next phase of expansion and development. Schultz's background in healthcare finance and medical technology aligns perfectly with Nuwellis' objectives, making this partnership a promising venture. Investors and stakeholders are optimistic about the positive impact Schultz will have on Nuwellis' future prospects.

data.title: Applied Aerospace & Defense opens new RF testing facility in Huntsville, Alabama, offering precision testing for antennas and electronics.
data.description: Applied Aerospace & Defense (Applied) disclosed on January 30, 2026, its plans to inaugurate a state-of-the-art Radio Frequency (RF) test range along with corresponding services at its Huntsville, Alabama base. The new facility will cater to precise RF testing for antennas and electronics.

data.title: BIGO Ads partners with Pixalate for better traffic quality in mobile advertising, tackling authenticity challenges.
data.description: In Singapore on January 30, 2026, BIGO Ads, an AI-powered programmatic advertising platform, operating under JOYY Inc. (NASDAQ: JOYY), revealed an enhanced collaboration with Pixalate to address the rising issue of traffic authenticity in the mobile advertising sector.

data.title: KB Home opens 2 new communities in Southwest Las Vegas - Landings & Reserves at Aven; homes from mid $400,000s.
data.description: A new residential development called Aven is now offering custom-built homes on spacious lots near schools and outdoor amenities in the city of Las Vegas. The homes are priced starting from the mid $400,000s. This announcement was made by KB Home (NYSE: KBH), a leading home construction company in the United States.

data.title: Stanley Black & Decker appoints Francesca Campbell as Senior VP, General Counsel. Campbell joins from Carrier.
data.description: Francesca Campbell has been appointed as the Senior Vice President, General Counsel, and Corporate Secretary at Stanley Black & Decker, a prominent company in tools and outdoor solutions, on January 30, 2026. Prior to this role, Campbell served at Carrier. Stanley Black & Decker is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol SWK.

data.title: IES Hldgs (NASDAQ: IESC) Q1 earnings missed estimates by -6.0% with EPS of $3.71 vs $3.94. Revenue increased by $121.5M.
data.description: On Friday, January 30, 2026, IES Hldgs (NASDAQ: IESC) released its Q1 earnings at 07:45 AM. The earnings report revealed that IES Hldgs fell short of projected earnings by -6.0%, with an EPS of $3.71 compared to an estimated $3.94. Additionally, revenue saw an increase of $121.50 million from the previous year. In the previous quarter, IES Hldgs showcased performance that can be further explored on Benzinga.com.
